title: Understanding cancer at a genetic level with AI
summary: Google DeepMind tools including AlphaFold, AlphaGenome, and Antigravity are being applied by Dr. Daudi Jjingo's team at Makerere University in Uganda to identify genetic targets for breast cancer vaccine development. The team analyzed 15,000 potential protein binding sites and narrowed them to 15 viable targets using only a laptop and server infrastructure, enabling resource-efficient collaboration with local health institutions.
